text: There is an eerie calm in these dimly lit, angular corridors. The glow beyond the glass feels otherworldly, urging me to ponder what lies within and beyond such boundaries. The second space, marked with 'R + D', speaks to innovation and inquiry, yet it all feels detached and slightly foreboding. I am filled with curiosity and a touch of unease—a reminder that places of creation can also feel alien if I pause too long in solitude.
